dos: Use Platinum White (#ffffff) as the default page background for most sections.
Apply Deep Violet (#533afd) specifically for primary interactive elements, ensuring strong visual call to action.
Employ sohne-var weight 300 for all display and large heading typography to maintain a refined, impactful presence.
Keep card surfaces subtle, using Powder Blue (#e5edf5) or Porcelain White (#f8fafd) with soft 6px rounded corners.
Utilize -0.0300em letter-spacing for large text (56px) to maintain a cohesive, modern typographic aesthetic.
Implement radial and linear gradients for hero banners and product showcases to add dynamic visual interest without overwhelming the UI.
Maintain a clear elementGap of 8px for logical grouping of related UI elements.
donts: Do not use saturated colors for large areas or text unless they are part of a decorative gradient or a specific accent.
Avoid using hard, sharp shadows; prefer soft, diffused shadows like rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2) 0px 0px 32px 8px for elevation.
Do not introduce new font families; sohne-var is the sole typeface for all typographic needs.
Refrain from using border radii other than 4px and 6px for interactive components and cards, respectively.
Do not use generic blue for links or buttons; Deep Violet (#533afd) is the designated action color.
Avoid high-contrast, bold headlines; the system relies on lighter weights (300, 400) even for large text.
Do not vary line heights significantly from the established typographic scale; ensure dense, compact text blocks for body copy and tighter leads for headlines.

colors.name: Midnight Ink
colors.role: Primary text, critical headings, icons, primary button text for ghost buttons

colors.name: Slate Blue
colors.role: Secondary text, muted links, subtle borders, descriptive captions

colors.name: Ghost Gray
colors.role: Tertiary text, placeholder text, inactive states, subtle dividers

colors.name: Platinum White
colors.role: Page backgrounds, card surfaces, primary button text against dark backgrounds

colors.name: Porcelain White
colors.role: Secondary card surfaces, subtle background variations

colors.name: Powder Blue
colors.role: Background for secondary sections, light card backgrounds

colors.name: Stone Gray
colors.role: Horizontal rules, subtle borders, graphical elements

colors.name: Deep Violet
colors.role: Primary calls to action (buttons, links), active states, significant icons — establishes brand presence and emphasizes interaction

colors.name: Washed Violet
colors.role: Border for ghost buttons, subtle accents

colors.name: Soft Violet
colors.role: Decorative icons, gradient highlights, sub-brand accents

colors.name: Accent Green
colors.role: Green outline accent for tags, dividers, and focused UI edges

colors.name: Vibrant Orange
colors.role: Orange outline accent for tags, dividers, and focused UI edges.

colors.name: Sunburst Gradient
colors.role: Decorative gradients in hero sections and product showcases, adding a dynamic, abstract visual element

colors.name: Dreamy Gradient
colors.role: Abstract background graphics, product display panels, adding depth and a tech-centric feel

designSystem.layout: The page primarily uses a max-width contained layout, though the hero section often employs full-bleed vibrant gradients to establish a dynamic visual anchor. Sections exhibit a comfortable vertical rhythm, with consistent spacing and a blend of centered content stacks and alternating text-left/image-right arrangements. Feature sets are often presented in multi-column card grids, supporting compact information delivery. Navigation is handled by a sticky top bar with clearly defined interactive elements.
designSystem.imagery: The site uses a combination of abstract, vibrant gradients for hero sections and product showcases (e.g., radial-gradient using Deep Violet, pinks, and light blues), and clean, contained product screenshots that are often presented within device mockups. For illustrative purposes, icons are outlined or filled with brand colors, maintaining a minimal yet functional aesthetic. Imagery serves primarily as decorative atmosphere and product showcase, with a lesser emphasis on photography, emphasizing a more technical and abstract visual story.

similar.why: Shares a sophisticated, modern aesthetic with minimal color, strong typography, and subtle UI elements.
Utilizes a clean white workspace, subtle gray scale, and a vibrant primary accent color for actions.
Combines a technical, precise feel with thoughtful spacing, restrained color usage, and abstract background graphics.
Employs a content-first approach with a high-contrast text palette, clean surfaces, and minimal decorative elements.

surfaces.name: Platinum White
surfaces.purpose: Primary page background and base canvas.

surfaces.name: Porcelain White
surfaces.purpose: Slightly elevated secondary surfaces, light card backgrounds.

surfaces.name: Powder Blue
surfaces.purpose: Backgrounds for alternating sections or distinct content blocks.

components.name: Primary Filled Button
components.description: Background: Deep Violet (#533afd), Text: Platinum White (#ffffff), Border: 4px radius, Padding: 15.5px vertical, 24px horizontal. Sohne-var weight 400.

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Background: transparent, Text: Midnight Ink (#061b31), Border: 0px, Padding: 12px vertical, 0px horizontal. Sohne-var weight 400.

components.name: Outlined Button
components.description: Background: transparent, Text: Deep Violet (#533afd), Border: Washed Violet (#b9b9f9), 4px radius, Padding: 14.5px vertical, 24px horizontal. Sohne-var weight 400.

components.name: Default Card
components.role: Content container for features and information.
components.description: Background: Powder Blue (#e5edf5), Border: none, 6px radius, Padding: 12px.

components.name: Feature Card
components.role: Highlighting key features or product aspects.
components.description: Background: Porcelain White (#f8fafd), Border: none, 6px radius, Box Shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2) 0px 0px 32px 8px. Padding: 12px.

components.name: Primary Navigation Link
components.description: Text: Midnight Ink (#061b31), Underline: none on hover, Padding: 0px.

typography.role: The primary typeface for all content. Weight 300 is used for large, impactful headlines, creating a sense of understated authority rather than shouting. Weight 400 is standard for body text, ensuring clarity and readability. The 'ss01' feature provides alternative character forms, and 'tnum' ensures tabular figures align numerically.

designSystem.description: Stripe's design system evokes a digital command center on a clean canvas. It combines a serene white background with structured grid layouts and a single vibrant violet to highlight actions and key information. Subtle shadows provide soft elevation, preventing elements from feeling flat, while compact typography paired with highly descriptive gradients for hero sections and product showcases adds visual depth without clutter. The overall effect is one of quiet efficiency, where information is paramount, and interactions are clearly signposted.

customSections.title: Agent Prompt Guide
customSections.content:
Quick Color Reference:
text: #061b31
background: #ffffff
border: #e5edf5
accent: #8087ff
primary action: #533afd (filled action)

Example Component Prompts:
Create a hero section: radial-gradient(circle, rgb(247, 45, 243), rgb(83, 58, 253) 33%, rgb(229, 237, 245) 66%) background. Headline 'La infraestructura financiera' at 56px sohne-var weight 300, #061b31, letter-spacing -0.03em. Primary Filled Button 'Empieza ahora' with #533afd background, #ffffff text, 4px radius, 15.5px 24px padding.

Create a default card: #e5edf5 background, 6px radius, 12px padding. Title 'Acepta pagos' at 22px sohne-var weight 400, #061b31. Body text 'Ofrece servicios financieros' at 14px sohne-var weight 400, #50617a.

Create an outlined button: transparent background, #533afd text, #b9b9f9 border with 4px radius, 14.5px 24px padding. Label 'Accede con tu cuenta de Google'.
